title: hieracium alatum subsp. lagopinum
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. lagopinum is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its medicinal and edible properties. It is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, and is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Hieracium alatum subsp. lagopinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine due to its versatility and potential health benefits.
